programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we will share with you some of the highlights of some of the best Women's Tournaments of 2019. We went to Florida to enjoy the US Open Women's Championship, across the Atlantic to England for the Staple International between England and Argentina, over to France where we stopped in Saint-Tropez for the Women's International and in Chantilly for the Women's French Open. Then back over to Argentina to enjoy the Pink Polo at Thai Polo Club.

programme.title: CHIO Aachen - Best Moments
programme.desc: Words speak for themselves. An equestrian show unrivalled anywhere in the world, offering the highest level of performance. The CHIO Aachen is probably the most prestigious horse show in Europe when it comes to show jumping and dressage. Riders compete against each other in this episode for victory in the show jumping competition. Relive all the magic moments of the 2019 edition of the CHIO Aachen.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Horsewomen
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates three extraordinary horsewomen and the captivating connection they have with their equine friends. We showcase exhebition work from American dressage star Sabine Schut-Kery, experience life through a lens with Poland’s fine art horse photographer Katarzyna Okrzesik-Mikolajek, and witness the holistic approach to healing in South West England with renowned trainer Connie Cox.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its Macan Turbo, Porsche sets the benchmark in the SUV segment. The optional performance package increases the output from 400 to 440 HP. programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Because
programme.desc: A high-end freeski documentary following 22 professional athletes across record snowfall winters, facing deep powder, massive cliffs, and extreme expeditions, while sharing their ambition, discipline, and drive to reach the next level of their careers.

programme.title: Begging For Change
programme.desc: This movie is about the lives of strange and exhilarating men, begging for change, and living a life that is fast, cheap, and affordable. All the things that make up a great ski movie

programme.title: Chaiyo Premiere Tour
programme.desc: A skate documentary following a 10-day tour across Thailand, featuring demos and premieres in several cities, capturing the energy of local skate scenes and the passion of skaters coming together to celebrate.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome back to this edition of the Atlantic Cup. It is time for the third and final leg of the competition, the inshore series. Dragon and Gryphon Solo 2 are tied for, and teams have added 4 extra crew, allowing them to push their boats around the tight courses in Naragannset Bay. Any mistake could be the difference between first and last. Who will become the winner in this edition?

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: The island of Rab has a rich history and has been inhabited by numerous great personalities. The Romans named this place Felix Arba or Lucky, which actually means Happy island. With 30 sandy beaches, Rab is truly a happy island and its beauty has been recognized by tourists from around the world for almost 125 years.

programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman out on the town with friends is saved from the clutches of a serial rapist by an ancient but gorgeous vampire, but at what cost?

programme.title: The Minx
programme.desc: Linnea Chiang is a mild-mannered tobacconist by day and a masked master thief by night; like some modern day Robin Hood, the black vinyl-clad "Minx" robs large corporations and gives the money away to homeless people on the streets of Chicago.

programme.title: Exorcism in Utero
programme.desc: Herma finds a powerful ring that possesses her when she tries it on. As her body transforms and mind begins to deteriorate, she must find a way out to save herself and her unborn baby.

programme.title: False River
programme.desc: Three lunatics escape from a mental institution only to find the real world is crazier than they ever were.

programme.title: Wardens - S09:E08 - River Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers keep an eye on a bustling river during a summer weekend, working to enhance fish habitats. Meanwhile, the Forestry division hosts a workshop showcasing the latest firefighting tools and methods.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E07 - Naturally Fascinating
programme.desc: Bolivia is a country of countless fascinating natural sights. We will begin on the high plateau of Altiplano, stopping by the world’s largest salt lake.Later, we will descend a few thousand meters using the road of death to the Los Yungas province. And then on to the shores of lake Titicaca, the highest navigable lake in the world.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E08 - Naturally Harmonious
programme.desc: Zambia, the Latvian region of Kurzeme, the Georgian provinces of Kakheti and Svaneti, seem to have very little in common. They lie in Africa, Europe and on the borderline between Europe and Asia respectively. Kakheti and Svaneti are both a part of Georgia but very unlike one another. So where is the connection? How are these regions similar?

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E09 - Gold, Sweat and Dragon's Blood
programme.desc: Tom and Kia explore a mysterious mine in Colorado.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E10 - Urban Prospectors
programme.desc: Tom and Kia prospect for gold in the heart of the city.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E03 - William And Kate A New Royal Family
programme.desc: Here's a look at the first year for a new Royal Family after Prince William and Kate welcome a baby boy.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E02 - The Fergie Story Paradise Lost
programme.desc: When Andrew and Sarah Ferguson tied the knot, she soon became one of the most popular women to be called the Duchess of York since the title was created back in 1385.

programme.title: Burning Beds
programme.desc: Hamburg's housing shortage forces car inspector Gina and British pyromaniac Harry to move into the same apartment.

programme.title: Adam Ondra: Pushing the Limits
programme.desc: Climber Adam Ondra, best in his field, is known for his fearless, record-breaking ascents. An intimate portrait explores his life beyond the headlines

programme.title: Farewell Halong
programme.desc: For generations, the Nguyen family has lived on and off the water amid breathtaking natural scenery. Now they are threatened with forced resettlement.

programme.title: Floating
programme.desc: A lesbian bachelorette’s night out with "the guys", including, alas, her future sperm donor. A mumblecore comedy on a raft.

programme.title: Not in my Backyard
programme.desc: One of the biggest taboos in society is the rehabilitation of sex offenders. This film takes the offender perspective.

programme.title: Homeopathy Unrefuted?
programme.desc: Is homeopathy a hoax or medicine? Here, homeopaths are allowed to share their very different views.

programme.title: Evil in the Woods
programme.desc: The "German indie machine" Malte Wirtz turns to horror and does it so successfully that the audience left the cinema hall in fear.

programme.title: The Gulls
programme.desc: Elza lives in a small town on the Caspian Sea. While her husband catches fish illegally, she dreams of breaking out of her small world.

programme.title: Alice and the Vampire Queen
programme.desc: Alice Oldman is an ex-con struggling to overcome the scars from her past. Then one night a dark stranger gives her an offer she cannot refuse. Make one special dish for his boss, the Vampire Queen.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: B
programme.desc: A gay couple plan for a weekend of mischief, baiting the Christian owner of a remote B Events take a deadly turn when another guest arrives, who might have something more sinister in mind.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: A Tiger in Winter
programme.desc: On a winter day, when a tiger escapes from the zoo, a man is kicked out of his girlfriend's house. Having no place to go, he wanders from here to there while working as a substitute driver and meets his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Adam and Evelyn
programme.desc: Summer 1989, East Germany. Adam works as a tailor, Evelyn as a waitress. They are planning a vacation together when Evelyn finds out that Adam is cheating on her and decides to leave for the holiday on her own.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Crown Lake

programme.title: Crown Lake

programme.title: Beach Babe Bingo
programme.desc: The water is cool and the girls are hot, what more could you want? Jump in and go for a swim, then wash up for a fun night out because the beach has nothing but sand and babes.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: Thirty the Series

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is Human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming or climate change a hoax.

programme.title: Holy Driver
programme.desc: Father Mike has a sit down with Donny, a Mob Capo and Carl, an undercover cop. He tells them that he and some other priests want to clean house and that they need their help to dispose of a pedophile priest. Things really hit home hard.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E04 - Episode 04
programme.desc: When Andy’s ride-sharing plans are derailed, Stefan steps up and presents a new opportunity for both of them. Lexi is questioned by the police, but the lies and guilt are about to overwhelm her.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E05 - Episode 05
programme.desc: Felicity scrambles to find out why charges against Sefako have been reinstated while Sefako confesses to the murder, and Lexi teeters on the edge.

programme.desc: Angelique lays a trap for Msizi that someone discovers. A celebratory supper at the Potgieters is interrupted by shocking news.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E03 - Episode 03
programme.desc: Gordon reveals the sordid details of why he hates a man who was once in Felicity’s life. A family meeting to discuss a Price family member’s fate ends with a shocking announcement.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E04 - Episode 04
programme.desc: After an ordeal, Felicity faces a difficult choice between an emotionally vulnerable family member and the career she’s worked so hard to build.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: When the Big Brother, who ruled the neighborhood, is sent to jail; the turf war starts between two groups. They need to find out who is going to be the next Big Brother to run the... See more »

programme.title: Black Cobra
programme.desc: A lone cop struggles to protect a female photographer from a gang of psychopathic bikers.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: A recovering heroin addict tries to rebuild his life as a jazz drummer, but crime, manipulation, and temptation threaten to pull him back into his dark past.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: A Marine rookie and his mentor vie for a nurse’s love, battling together in the air and on Nicaraguan battlefields.

programme.title: Long John Silver's Return to Treasure Island
programme.desc: Long John Silver rescues his friend Jim from rival pirates and risks all for hidden treasure in this colorful swashbuckling sequel.

programme.title: Kentucky Rifle
programme.desc: While the wagon train forges ahead, a few people stay behind to repair a disabled rifle-filled wagon

programme.title: Suddenly

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it

programme.title: Quicksand
programme.desc: After borrowing $20 from his employer's cash register, an auto mechanic is plunged into a series of increasingly disastrous circumstances which rapidly spiral out of his control

programme.title: Not Here
programme.desc: Do you ever feel like your prayers are going unanswered? The enemy wants you to believe God’s not listening, but the truth is He hears you. His presence is with you in the mountains and the valleys, and He’s working one moment at a time.

programme.title: Places Everyone!
programme.desc: Stand there and see what God can do. In “Places Everyone!,” Pastor Steven shows us that God meets us on our path so we can receive restoration in unexpected places.

programme.title: A Steady Hand For A Sudden Blessing
programme.desc: In “A Steady Hand For A Sudden Blessing,” Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that even when we don’t see God moving, His hand still holds us steadily.

programme.title: Blessed Because You Believe
programme.desc: We live in a time when it’s getting harder and harder to believe things. But it’s so important to remember that in a world full of illusion and deception, God is still true. Pastor Holly Furtick shares from Mary’s perspective some truths about God we can believe as we cling to faith this Christmas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insists that the imprisoned woman is her mother and Mother Isabel tells her that Rosa Blanco, imprisoned for murdering a man, is not her mother. Fate intertwines the warring families. Search for the identity of "El Doliente".

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel proposes to meet Camila at a dinner to tell her that he is going to get "her mother" out of jail. Mother Isabel only wants Camila to be happy and for that she recommends her to start a family.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Leonel bets that he will win Abigail over at Charito's birthday party. Rita goes to Guillermo's house and demands that her sister be allowed to see Abigail, getting into a fight with Ana Leonidas and slapping her. Abigail realizes that Ninoska likes Carlos Alfredo.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Abigail declares her love to Carlos Alfredo, but he rejects her. Back at school, Abigail steals a kiss from Carlos Alfredo, and María Clara catches them. Mother Teresa asks Abigail why she thinks María Clara holds a grudge against her.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Ricardo expresses his feelings for María Bonita in an attempt to pursue a serious relationship with her. Norma discovers that Gertrudis and Claudio are responsible for Marco Aurelio's death. Isabel stands up for Malena. Pedro calls another hitman to eliminate Lorena. Pedro informs Guillermo that his wife is living at the Corona family's house.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Isabel and Malena seal their pact of unconditional friendship. Alberto obtains a copy of the file of the drug trafficker accused of Marco Aurelio's death. Magda tells Lorena what happened and suggests opening an e-mail account, where the video with her confession will be kept. Alberto raises the possibility that his uncle Claudio is involved in his father's death.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Pastora announces that the letter is a confession in which Father Potentá assures that Clara Inés is not a Saint Mary.

programme.title: CASA Y ESTILO
programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: CONECTADOS
programme.desc: Programa religioso que ofrece enseñanzas y reflexiones sobre la fe.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel propone reunirse en una cena con Camila para decirle que va a sacar de la carcel a "su mamá". La Madre Isabel sólo quiere que Camila sea feliz y para eso le recomienda que forme una familia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila está feliz pués su madre, al fin, está libre, pero Max sigue dudando. Reunidas, quiere saber porqué la abandonó la mujer finge no recordar esos momentos dolorosos. La abandona por segunda vez. Es un golpe muy fuerte.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio necesita escapar con Julia. Camila esta negada al amor, Jeli quiere que admita lo que siente por Max y ella le cuenta la razón del rechazo. En el orfanato habla con el Padre Tiziano y la Madre Isabel sobre Rosa Blanco; y cree que tiene que ver en este asunto y que es El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Esperanza, sabe sobre Rosa Blanco. Gregorio y Julia, fingen ante la familia, pero continúan encontrándose. Los Aragón siempre en guerra por la muerte de Marcos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max busca noticias sobre Rosa Blanco; la Madre Isabel le confiesa al Padre Tiziano que ya Camila conoce el nombre de su mamá. Camila descubre a Max en un beso con Astrid. Familias en guerra.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Piensan que es Rosa Blanco quien desató la guerra entre las familias. La Madre Isabel piensa comunicar la noticia a Camila que cree que ella es su madre. Ezequiel y Fausto armados, se enfrentan.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila va a encontrarse con una de las Rosas Blanco para saber algo más sobre la niña de la foto que era ella pequeña y el destino de su madre. Está decepcionada porque la mujer no conoce nada y esto la pone triste.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.title: El Hormigón
programme.desc: El hormigón es un superhéroe que está harto de la mafia de su ciudad y decide combatirla con ayuda del Karate y la salsa.

programme.title: Abolición De La Propiedad
programme.desc: En un sótano oscuro, Norma escucha su voz y la de Everio en una vieja grabadora Ampex. Cada que él vuelve a bajar, la detiene. Han estado platicándose sus vidas, varias veces las conversaciones grabadas terminan coincidiendo con las charlas que ellos sostienen. Lo que le preocupa a Norma es que hasta ese día no conocía a Everio y lo último que escuchó fue que él la ahorcaba.

programme.title: El Deseo de Domingo
programme.desc: Narra la historia de Domingo, un adulto mayor que sufre Alzheimer y pasa sus días en un geriátrico en la ciudad de Viedma, desde donde intenta, a toda costa, viajar a la Capital, a San Isidro, a ver el gran premio de turf Carlos Pellegrini. Pero claro, no se trata de cualquier premio, sino el del año 1952. Para eso necesitará de la ayuda de Marcelo, su nieto, quien se encuentra en el dilema de conformarse con su puesto en una dependencia pública o seguir luchando por triunfar con su banda de rock. …

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
